---
title: "Robustness"
format: html
---

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
# Essential libraries
# install.packages("caret")
# install.packages("glmnet")
# install.packages("ranger")
# install.packages("randomForest")
# install.packages("xgboost")
# install.packages("iml")
# install.packages("slider")
library(tidyverse)
library(readxl)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(dplyr)
library(stringr)
library(lubridate)
library(arrow)
library(tidymodels)
library(yardstick)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(rsample)   # group_initial_split
library(caret)
library(ggplot2)
library(ranger)
library(iml)
library(knitr)
library(slider)
# install.packages("ipumsr")   # Install if needed
library(ipumsr)
library(fixest)

library(broom)
library(gt)

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_bound2 <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2.rds"))

```

```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

# ---------- 1) Build the sample for a given eps ----------
prep_sample <- function(df, eps, tau_min = -6, tau_max = 12){
  df %>%
    mutate(
      thr = mw_base + delta_event,
      bound = as.integer(
        !is.na(w_pre) & !is.na(mw_base) & !is.na(thr) &
          w_pre >= (mw_base - eps) & w_pre < (thr + eps)
      ),
      treat_bound = as.integer(treated == 1 & bound == 1),
      tau  = as.integer(tau),
      ym   = as.integer(ym),
      cell = interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
    ) %>%
    filter(tau >= tau_min, tau <= tau_max)
}

# ---------- 2) Drop treated events with share_bound == 0 ----------
drop_zero_bound_events <- function(df){
  ev <- df %>%
    filter(treated == 1) %>%
    group_by(event_id) %>%
    summarise(
      share_bound = weighted.mean(bound == 1, EARNWT_adj, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  drop_events <- ev %>%
    filter(share_bound == 0) %>%
    pull(event_id)

  df2 <- df %>%
    filter(!(event_id %in% drop_events))

  list(df = df2, ev = ev, drop_events = drop_events)
}

# ---------- 3) Extract bin coefficients robustly ----------
extract_bins <- function(m){
  td <- broom::tidy(m)

  # The skeleton guarantees that both rows exist even if one term is missing
  skeleton <- tibble(
    key = c("post_short_tb", "post_mid_tb"),
    Term = c(
      "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
      "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound"
    )
  )

  out <- td %>%
    mutate(
      key = case_when(
        grepl("post_short", term) & grepl("treat_bound", term) ~ "post_short_tb",
        grepl("post_mid",   term) & grepl("treat_bound", term) ~ "post_mid_tb",
        TRUE ~ NA_character_
      )
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(key)) %>%
    mutate(
      stars = case_when(
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.10 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      coef_se = sprintf("%.3f%s\n(%.3f)", estimate, stars, std.error)
    ) %>%
    select(key, coef_se)

  skeleton %>%
    left_join(out, by = "key") %>%
    select(Term, coef_se)
}

# ---------- 4) Run one specification ----------
get_wald_p <- function(w){
  if (!is.null(w$p.value)) return(as.numeric(w$p.value))
  if (!is.null(w$`p-value`)) return(as.numeric(w$`p-value`))
  if (!is.null(w$p)) return(as.numeric(w$p))
  NA_real_
}

run_spec <- function(df_raw, eps, tau_min = -6, tau_max = 12){
  df0 <- prep_sample(df_raw, eps, tau_min, tau_max)

  # Event count before dropping zero-bound treated events
  n_events_total <- df0 %>%
    distinct(event_id) %>%
    nrow()

  dropped <- drop_zero_bound_events(df0)
  df <- dropped$df
  drop_events <- dropped$drop_events
  ev <- dropped$ev

  n_events_kept <- df %>%
    distinct(event_id) %>%
    nrow()

  # Dynamic tau model
  m_tau <- feols(
    UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound, ref = -1) + i(tau, treat_bound, ref = -1) + AGE + I(AGE^2)
    | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
    data = df,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  w_pre <- fixest::wald(m_tau, keep = "tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound")
  p_pre <- get_wald_p(w_pre)

  # Bin model
  df_bins <- df %>%
    filter(tau != 0) %>%
    mutate(
      post_short = as.integer(tau >= 1 & tau <= 6),
      post_mid   = as.integer(tau >= 7 & tau <= 11)
    )

  m_bins <- feols(
    UHRSWORKORG ~
      post_short:treat_bound + post_mid:treat_bound +
      post_short:bound + post_mid:bound +
      AGE + I(AGE^2)
    | event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell + UNION + OCC2010 + IND,
    data = df_bins,
    weights = ~EARNWT_adj,
    cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id,
    lean = TRUE
  )

  tab_bins <- extract_bins(m_bins)

  list(
    eps = eps,
    n_events_total = n_events_total,
    n_events_kept = n_events_kept,
    n_events_dropped = length(drop_events),
    p_pretrend = p_pre,
    tab_bins = tab_bins,
    m_tau = m_tau,
    m_bins = m_bins,
    event_summary = ev
  )
}

# ---------- 5) Run specifications ----------
spec0  <- run_spec(dat_bound2, eps = 0.00)
spec25 <- run_spec(dat_bound2, eps = 0.25)
spec50 <- run_spec(dat_bound2, eps = 0.50)

# ---------- 6) Build comparison table ----------
tab_bins_all <- spec0$tab_bins %>%
  rename(`eps=0` = coef_se) %>%
  left_join(
    spec25$tab_bins %>% rename(`eps=0.25` = coef_se),
    by = "Term"
  ) %>%
  left_join(
    spec50$tab_bins %>% rename(`eps=0.50` = coef_se),
    by = "Term"
  ) %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      Term = "Pre-trend Wald p-value (τ = -6 to -2)",
      `eps=0`    = sprintf("%.3f", spec0$p_pretrend),
      `eps=0.25` = sprintf("%.3f", spec25$p_pretrend),
      `eps=0.50` = sprintf("%.3f", spec50$p_pretrend)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Treated events dropped (share_bound = 0)",
      `eps=0`    = as.character(spec0$n_events_dropped),
      `eps=0.25` = as.character(spec25$n_events_dropped),
      `eps=0.50` = as.character(spec50$n_events_dropped)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × State FE",
      `eps=0`    = "Yes",
      `eps=0.25` = "Yes",
      `eps=0.50` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Month FE",
      `eps=0`    = "Yes",
      `eps=0.25` = "Yes",
      `eps=0.50` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Cell FE",
      `eps=0`    = "Yes",
      `eps=0.25` = "Yes",
      `eps=0.50` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Industry / Occupation / Union FE",
      `eps=0`    = "Yes",
      `eps=0.25` = "Yes",
      `eps=0.50` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Age Controls",
      `eps=0`    = "Age, Age²",
      `eps=0.25` = "Age, Age²",
      `eps=0.50` = "Age, Age²"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Clustered SE",
      `eps=0`    = "State & Event",
      `eps=0.25` = "State & Event",
      `eps=0.50` = "State & Event"
    )
  )

gt_bins <- tab_bins_all %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "5.1 Robustness: Bound Definition and Event Dropping") %>%
  cols_label(
    Term = "",
    `eps=0` = "eps=0",
    `eps=0.25` = "eps=0.25",
    `eps=0.50` = "eps=0.50"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Term ~ px(400),
    `eps=0` ~ px(150),
    `eps=0.25` ~ px(150),
    `eps=0.50` ~ px(150)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_source_notes()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    source_notes.font.size = "small"
  )

gtsave(
  gt_bins,
  here("tables", "robust_bound_eps_compare.png"),
  vwidth = 1700,
  vheight = 1100
)

```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}

dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))

# --- Common transformations ---
dat_main_eps <- dat_main_eps %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = if ("cell" %in% names(.)) cell else interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12)

dat_bins <- dat_main_eps %>%
  filter(tau != 0) %>%
  mutate(
    post_short = as.integer(tau >= 1 & tau <= 6),
    post_mid   = as.integer(tau >= 7 & tau <= 11)
  )

# --- Formulas: baseline vs. dropping OCC/IND/UNION controls ---
fe_core <- "event_id^STATEFIP + event_id^ym + event_id^cell"

fe_full <- paste0(fe_core, " + UNION + OCC2010 + IND")
fe_drop <- fe_core

f_bins_full <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps + ",
  "post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps + AGE + I(AGE^2) | ", fe_full
))
f_bins_drop <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ post_short:treat_bound_eps + post_mid:treat_bound_eps + ",
  "post_short:bound_eps + post_mid:bound_eps + AGE + I(AGE^2) | ", fe_drop
))

f_tau_full <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound_eps, ref=-1) + i(tau, treat_bound_eps, ref=-1) + AGE + I(AGE^2) | ",
  fe_full
))
f_tau_drop <- as.formula(paste0(
  "UHRSWORKORG ~ i(tau, bound_eps, ref=-1) + i(tau, treat_bound_eps, ref=-1) + AGE + I(AGE^2) | ",
  fe_drop
))

# --- Run models ---
m_bins_full <- feols(
  f_bins_full, data = dat_bins,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj, cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id, lean = TRUE
)
m_bins_drop <- feols(
  f_bins_drop, data = dat_bins,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj, cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id, lean = TRUE
)

m_tau_full <- feols(
  f_tau_full, data = dat_main_eps,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj, cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id, lean = TRUE
)
m_tau_drop <- feols(
  f_tau_drop, data = dat_main_eps,
  weights = ~EARNWT_adj, cluster = ~STATEFIP + event_id, lean = TRUE
)

# --- Pre-trend Wald p-values ---
get_p <- function(w){
  if (!is.null(w$p.value)) return(as.numeric(w$p.value))
  if (!is.null(w$`p-value`)) return(as.numeric(w$`p-value`))
  if (!is.null(w$p)) return(as.numeric(w$p))
  NA_real_
}

p_pre_full <- get_p(fixest::wald(m_tau_full, keep = "tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound_eps"))
p_pre_drop <- get_p(fixest::wald(m_tau_drop, keep = "tau::-(6|5|4|3|2):treat_bound_eps"))

# --- Helper to extract bin coefficients (SE in parentheses) ---

extract_bins <- function(m){
  td <- broom::tidy(m)

  wanted <- tibble(
    Term = c(
      "Post (1-6) × Treated × Bound",
      "Post (7-11) × Treated × Bound"
    ),
    term_pattern = c(
      "^post_short:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_short$",
      "^post_mid:treat_bound_eps$|^treat_bound_eps:post_mid$"
    )
  )

  wanted %>%
    rowwise() %>%
    mutate(
      estimate = td$estimate[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1],
      std.error = td$std.error[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1],
      p.value = td$p.value[grepl(term_pattern, td$term)][1]
    ) %>%
    ungroup() %>%
    mutate(
      stars = case_when(
        is.na(p.value) ~ "",
        p.value < 0.01 ~ "***",
        p.value < 0.05 ~ "**",
        p.value < 0.10 ~ "*",
        TRUE ~ ""
      ),
      coef_se = ifelse(
        is.na(estimate),
        NA_character_,
        sprintf("%.3f%s\n(%.3f)", estimate, stars, std.error)
      )
    ) %>%
    select(Term, coef_se)
}

tab_full <- extract_bins(m_bins_full) %>% rename(`Full controls` = coef_se)
tab_drop <- extract_bins(m_bins_drop) %>% rename(`Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = coef_se)

tab <- tab_full %>%
  left_join(tab_drop, by = "Term") %>%
  bind_rows(
    tibble(
      Term = "Pre-trend Wald p-value (τ = -6 to -2)",
      `Full controls` = sprintf("%.3f", p_pre_full),
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = sprintf("%.3f", p_pre_drop)
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Observations",
      `Full controls` = format(broom::glance(m_bins_full)$nobs, big.mark = ","),
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = format(broom::glance(m_bins_drop)$nobs, big.mark = ",")
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × State FE",
      `Full controls` = "Yes",
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Month FE",
      `Full controls` = "Yes",
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Event × Cell FE",
      `Full controls` = "Yes",
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "Yes"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Industry / Occupation / Union FE",
      `Full controls` = "Yes",
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "No"
    ),
    tibble(
      Term = "Clustered SE",
      `Full controls` = "State & Event",
      `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "State & Event"
    )
  )

gt_tab <- tab %>%
  gt() %>%
  tab_header(title = "5.2 Robustness: Dropping Industry/Occupation/Union Controls") %>%
  cols_label(
    Term = "",
    `Full controls` = "Full controls",
    `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` = "Drop OCC/IND/UNION"
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    Term ~ px(400),
    `Full controls` ~ px(225),
    `Drop OCC/IND/UNION` ~ px(225)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(whitespace = "pre-line"),
    locations = cells_source_notes()
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "small",
    data_row.padding = px(3),
    source_notes.font.size = "small"
  )

gtsave(gt_tab, here("tables", "robust_drop_controls.png"), vwidth = 1400, vheight = 900)
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

dat_main_eps <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_main_eps.rds"))
tau_support <- dat_main_eps %>%
  mutate(tau = as.integer(tau)) %>%
  # Match the main text: use the [-6, 12] window; if tau == 0 is dropped there, drop it here too
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12) %>%
  # filter(tau != 0) %>%   # Uncomment if you want the appendix to exclude tau == 0 as well
  group_by(tau) %>%
  summarise(
    `Events (any obs)`     = n_distinct(event_id),
    `Events (treated obs)` = n_distinct(event_id[treated == 1]),
    `Treated obs`          = sum(treated == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(tau)

gt_tau_support <- tau_support %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "tau") %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Appendix B: Event Support by Event Time (τ)"
  ) %>%
  cols_label(
    tau = html("Event time, &tau;")
  )%>%
  tab_stubhead(label = html("&tau;")) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(`Events (any obs)`, `Events (treated obs)`),
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(`Treated obs`),
    decimals = 0,
    use_seps = TRUE
  ) %>%
  cols_width(
    stub() ~ px(55),
    `Events (any obs)` ~ px(150),
    `Events (treated obs)` ~ px(170),
    `Treated obs` ~ px(120)
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = px(11),
    heading.title.font.size = px(14),
    data_row.padding = px(1),
    column_labels.padding = px(2),
    source_notes.font.size = px(10),
    table.width = px(520)
  )

# Save as a PNG for PDF inclusion
gtsave(
  gt_tau_support,
  filename = here("tables", "app_tau_event_support.png"),
  vwidth = 1400,
  vheight = 900
)

# Optionally save an HTML version as well
gtsave(gt_tau_support, here("tables", "app_tau_event_support.html"))
```


```{r echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, results='hide'}
dat_bound2b <- readRDS(here("data", "processed", "dat_bound2b.rds"))
# ===== 0) Prepare the analysis sample (matching the main specification) =====
df <- dat_bound2b %>%
  mutate(
    tau  = as.integer(tau),
    ym   = as.integer(ym),
    cell = interaction(SEX, EDUC, drop = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  filter(tau >= -6, tau <= 12) %>%
  filter(tau != 0) %>%                 # Recommended: drop tau == 0
  filter(!is.na(delta_event))

# ===== 1) Create event-level terciles without dropping events =====
ev_grp <- df %>%
  distinct(event_id, delta_event)

q33 <- quantile(ev_grp$delta_event, 1/3, na.rm = TRUE)
q66 <- quantile(ev_grp$delta_event, 2/3, na.rm = TRUE)

ev_grp <- ev_grp %>%
  mutate(shock_grp = case_when(
    delta_event <= q33 ~ "small",
    delta_event <= q66 ~ "medium",
    TRUE               ~ "large"
  ))

df <- df %>% left_join(ev_grp, by = c("event_id","delta_event"))
# ===== 2) Recover event state, year-month, and shock group for each event =====
# The event month is conceptually tau == 0, but tau == 0 was dropped above.
# So the event-level metadata are recovered directly from dat_bound2b for a more robust lookup.

event_info <- dat_bound2b %>%
  mutate(
    tau = as.integer(tau),
    ym  = as.integer(ym)
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(delta_event)) %>%
  # Keep only treated-state event metadata; update this if your treated variable has a different name
  filter(treated == 1) %>%
  group_by(event_id) %>%
  # Use tau == 0 when available; otherwise fall back to the month closest to zero
  arrange(abs(tau), tau) %>%
  summarise(
    STATEFIP   = first(STATEFIP),
    event_ym   = ym[which.min(abs(tau))],
    delta_event= first(delta_event),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  left_join(ev_grp, by = c("event_id", "delta_event"))

# ===== 3) Use state names when available; otherwise map STATEFIP to names =====
# This is a simple built-in crosswalk, including DC
state_crosswalk <- tibble::tribble(
  ~STATEFIP, ~state_name,
   1, "Alabama",  2, "Alaska",   4, "Arizona",   5, "Arkansas",
   6, "California", 8, "Colorado", 9, "Connecticut", 10, "Delaware",
  11, "District of Columbia", 12, "Florida", 13, "Georgia", 15, "Hawaii",
  16, "Idaho", 17, "Illinois", 18, "Indiana", 19, "Iowa",
  20, "Kansas", 21, "Kentucky", 22, "Louisiana", 23, "Maine",
  24, "Maryland", 25, "Massachusetts", 26, "Michigan", 27, "Minnesota",
  28, "Mississippi", 29, "Missouri", 30, "Montana", 31, "Nebraska",
  32, "Nevada", 33, "New Hampshire", 34, "New Jersey", 35, "New Mexico",
  36, "New York", 37, "North Carolina", 38, "North Dakota", 39, "Ohio",
  40, "Oklahoma", 41, "Oregon", 42, "Pennsylvania", 44, "Rhode Island",
  45, "South Carolina", 46, "South Dakota", 47, "Tennessee", 48, "Texas",
  49, "Utah", 50, "Vermont", 51, "Virginia", 53, "Washington",
  54, "West Virginia", 55, "Wisconsin", 56, "Wyoming"
)

event_info <- event_info %>%
  left_join(state_crosswalk, by = "STATEFIP") %>%
  mutate(
    event_year  = event_ym %/% 100,
    event_month = event_ym %% 100
  ) %>%
  arrange(shock_grp, delta_event, event_year, state_name)

# Preview a few rows from each group
event_info %>%
  select(shock_grp, state_name, event_year, event_month, delta_event) %>%
  print(n = 30)

# ===== 4) Pick representative events from each group =====

# small: the five smallest shocks
small_ex <- event_info %>%
  filter(shock_grp == "small") %>%
  arrange(delta_event, event_year, state_name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  mutate(example_type = "Smallest in small group")

# medium: the five events closest to the median shock in the medium group
med_median <- median(event_info$delta_event[event_info$shock_grp == "medium"], na.rm = TRUE)

medium_ex <- event_info %>%
  filter(shock_grp == "medium") %>%
  mutate(dist_to_med = abs(delta_event - med_median)) %>%
  arrange(dist_to_med, event_year, state_name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  mutate(example_type = "Closest to medium-group median") %>%
  select(-dist_to_med)

# large: the five largest shocks
large_ex <- event_info %>%
  filter(shock_grp == "large") %>%
  arrange(desc(delta_event), event_year, state_name) %>%
  slice_head(n = 5) %>%
  mutate(example_type = "Largest in large group")

shock_examples <- bind_rows(small_ex, medium_ex, large_ex) %>%
  mutate(
    delta_event = sprintf("%.2f", delta_event),
    event_date  = paste0(event_year, "-", sprintf("%02d", event_month))
  ) %>%
  select(example_type, shock_grp, state_name, event_date, delta_event)

shock_examples


```
